query:
SELECT 
  availableCash, 
  initialCapital,
  ROUND((availableCash - initialCapital) / initialCapital * 100, 2) AS cashRoiPct
FROM paperLedger LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS openPositions,
  ROUND(SUM(allocatedCapital), 2) AS totalDeployed,
  ROUND(MIN(allocatedCapital), 2) AS minPosition,
  ROUND(MAX(allocatedCapital), 2) AS maxPosition,
  ROUND(AVG(allocatedCapital), 2) AS avgPosition
FROM paperPositions WHERE status = 'open';

  ROUND(MIN(allocatedCapital), 2) AS minPosition,
